summary.en: IEC 62933 (Electrical energy storage systems) sets system-level functional, safety, and performance requirements for BESS. IEC 62933-2-1 covers unit parameters and testing, IEC 62933-5-2 covers safety requirements for grid-integrated systems. Sri Lanka project owners, PUCSL, and CEB may reference IEC 62933 for system-level BESS performance and safety evidence in utility-scale or commercial storage projects. This standard is in active development and adoption globally; Sri Lanka does not yet have a domestic equivalent.
summary.zh: IEC 62933（电能存储系统）为BESS设定系统级功能、安全和性能要求。IEC 62933-2-1涵盖单元参数和测试，IEC 62933-5-2涵盖电网并网系统安全要求。斯里兰卡项目业主、PUCSL和CEB在公用事业规模或商业储能项目中可能参考IEC 62933作为系统级BESS性能和安全证据。该标准在全球范围内仍在积极制定和采用中；斯里兰卡尚无国内等效标准。
summary.zht: IEC 62933（電能存儲系統）為BESS設定系統級功能、安全和性能要求。IEC 62933-2-1涵蓋單元參數和測試，IEC 62933-5-2涵蓋電網併網系統安全要求。斯里蘭卡項目業主、PUCSL和CEB在公用事業規模或商業儲能項目中可能參考IEC 62933作為系統級BESS性能和安全證據。該標準在全球範圍內仍在積極制定和採用中；斯里蘭卡尚無國內等效標準。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62933-2-1: Electrical energy storage systems — Unit parameters and testing methods — Part 2-1: General specification
IEC 62933-5-2: Electrical energy storage systems — Safety requirements for grid-integrated energy storage systems

summary.en: China uses GB/T 36276-2023 for electric energy storage lithium-ion battery systems and GB/T 36558-2023 for general technical requirements of electrochemical energy storage systems connected to the power system. These Chinese system-level standards have partial technical alignment with IEC 62933 but are not equivalent and are not accepted as substitutes for IEC 62933 evidence by international project owners or financiers.
summary.zh: 中国采用GB/T 36276-2023作为电力储能锂离子电池系统标准，GB/T 36558-2023作为电化学储能系统接入电力系统通用技术要求。这些中国系统级标准与IEC 62933有部分技术对应，但不等效，国际项目业主或融资方不接受其替代IEC 62933证据。
summary.zht: 中國採用GB/T 36276-2023作為電力儲能鋰離子電池系統標準，GB/T 36558-2023作為電化學儲能系統接入電力系統通用技術要求。這些中國系統級標準與IEC 62933有部分技術對應，但不等效，國際項目業主或融資方不接受其替代IEC 62933證據。

gap.en: IEC 62933 system-level evidence is increasingly expected by project owners and lenders for utility-scale and commercial BESS in Sri Lanka. Chinese GB/T 36276 and GB/T 36558 reports are domestic evidence only and are not substitutes. Exporters targeting utility-scale Sri Lanka projects should prepare IEC 62933-2-1 performance documentation and IEC 62933-5-2 safety evidence, and engage with PUCSL/CEB on system-level storage technical requirements before project submission.
gap.zh: IEC 62933系统级证据在斯里兰卡公用事业规模和商业BESS项目中越来越受到项目业主和贷款方重视。中国GB/T 36276和GB/T 36558报告仅为国内证据，不可替代。针对斯里兰卡公用事业规模项目的出口商应准备IEC 62933-2-1性能文件和IEC 62933-5-2安全证据，并在项目提交前与PUCSL/CEB就系统级储能技术要求进行沟通。
gap.zht: IEC 62933系統級證據在斯里蘭卡公用事業規模和商業BESS項目中越來越受到項目業主和貸款方重視。中國GB/T 36276和GB/T 36558報告僅為國內證據，不可替代。針對斯里蘭卡公用事業規模項目的出口商應準備IEC 62933-2-1性能文件和IEC 62933-5-2安全證據，並在項目提交前與PUCSL/CEB就系統級儲能技術要求進行溝通。

mandatory_status.target: Voluntary as a Sri Lanka national standard but increasingly expected by project owners, lenders, and PUCSL/CEB for utility-scale BESS
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended — GB/T 36276-2023 and GB/T 36558-2023 are the domestic system-level equivalents

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 36276 and GB/T 36558 system-level evidence does not substitute for IEC 62933 documentation expected by Sri Lanka project stakeholders. Prepare IEC 62933-series performance and safety evidence for utility-scale and commercial BESS projects in Sri Lanka.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 36276和GB/T 36558系统级证据不能替代斯里兰卡项目各方期望的IEC 62933文件。针对斯里兰卡公用事业规模和商业BESS项目，需准备IEC 62933系列性能和安全证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 36276和GB/T 36558系統級證據不能替代斯里蘭卡項目各方期望的IEC 62933文件。針對斯里蘭卡公用事業規模和商業BESS項目，需準備IEC 62933系列性能和安全證據。
